raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Utilities will be required to provide their customers with more accurate outage maps that include wind speeds and circuit data.",
    "Utilities will coordinate restoration more closely with local governments and first responders.",
    "Approximately $200 million in existing funds will be expedited for microgrids and small-scale solar-storage for vulnerable customers and critical facilities.",
    "The bill SB 256 aims to strengthen California’s wildfire response by increasing public safety through better communication.",
    "The bill SB 618 would require investor-owned utilities to compensate ratepayers $30 for every 24 hours that they are without power.",
    "Public utilities will be required to identify ways to compensate customers who experience de-energization events in their wildfire mitigation plans.",
    "PSPS events have become standard practice for utilities due to the ever-increasing frequency and severity of climate emergencies."
  ]
}
```
